reviews.text: Nick knows a lot about his field of practice and prides himself on learning and improving in others. This makes him extremely well rounded. If he does not have an answer, he will find it rather than claim to know it. He doesn’t make false or empty promises, he delivers! He will do everything to get you the best results and in our case, the result was better than we were hoping for.  In cases like my brothers, the families are generally most affected, and this is something Nick and his staff understands. God bless Nick and his staff and if you're looking for someone that's going to work hard for you while caring you should hire Nick Todero.

If you need an attorney that cares about your marriage and your children then Mr Todaro is the attorney to use. He cares with his heart and seeks compassion when dealing with children. He will take care of your family like they are his own. To seek a fast and just resolution just ask Nick’s advice.
I am so proud  Nick Todaro. Honest hard worker. Always do a great job. Very fair and complete on his work.  I am so glad he got is own company. Go Nick
Nick handled my divorce with the utmost care and compassion. He was very knowledgeable with divorce and family law. He has a pleasant disposition and was easy to contact.

I hired him back in 2019 for child support, our case was stalled out due to Covid. (Understandable) when we finally went to court in August of 2020 he did absolutely nothing for me. I requested for the attorney fees to be paid as well as back child support and Victor said “He’s not going to pay the fees.Let’s not ask for them” 🙃 I figured he would fight for me and request them because tbh I don’t have the guts to stick up for myself that’s why I hired a lawyer to stick up for me! In the end nothing got done the father of my kids paid $2,500 due to The JUDGE informing he needed to (he is $35,000 behind in child support). I’ve waited 2 years just to be sure I’m not leaving a bad review for no reason. But nothing has been done I wasted $3,500 for absolutely nothing the attorney general could’ve done the EXACT same thing For Free. This review is mainly for single moms looking for a good attorney. I know we don't have the luxury of wasting money for someone not to provide the service we paid for.
He fought for my case showed up in time even when he had a injured ankle he was there and never settled for anything but what i wanted this was a family case thank you Mr.Torres...1,000 stars
Great. Service

Absolutely appreciate everything he did for me. He's a great lawyer and would use him again.

reviews.text: Armin Jezari is an exceptionally skilled and dedicated attorney. His professionalism, intelligence, and commitment to his clients set him apart in the legal field. reviews.text: Armin worked on my case for 4 years for innocent spouse claim to the IRS. We waited patiently while appeals were sent many times. We won the case! He diligently worked on appeals for me and it paid off. I highly recommend  him to all your tax attorney needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your kind words!

reviews.text: Great group of people who worked diligently over a period of time to take care of our needs!

I don't really know where to start. It was a long,
confusing and overwhelming experience with the IRS, until I contacted Jezari Law. After 10 years of paying on back taxes through an Installment Agreement,  I accidentally paid my current liability twice. I canceled one payment and the IRS placed my agreement in default and sent letters of intent to levy. After several extremely long calls to the Agency and feeling completely defeated, I sought help with Jezari Law.  Statute of Limitations for Collection was explained to me and that was the reason the IRS was being such bullies to me. Mr. Armin personally took great care leading me through this nightmare and now my account is deemed non-collectable.  Thank you so much for constantly telling me not to worry and don't be afraid of the IRS. And thank you for helping me.
I spoke to Armin he is such an easy guy to talk to I really do appreciate your time. You have helped me a lot  God bless you Armin thank you

I have been looking for Attorneys for a while my tax purposes this gentleman treated me with such respect helped me 100% didn’t even charge me because all he gave me was advice I’m very grateful That I met him if you need advice or help this gentleman is the guy to go to his name is Armin I am very happy with everything he did for me he went above and beyond
reviews.ownerResponse: We value our clients and strive to provide the best representation possible. Thank you for your comments.

reviews.text: I was recently separated from my girl friend and we had a child.  Things got ugly between me and my ex.  So I get on line and I didn't  have a clue who to trust, bc more than anything you want to be significant and not just a number.  I was worried about choosing the wrong lawyer.  My biggest fear was choosing a Iawyer that was looking for an easy paycheck and not giving it is all.  I was looking for a lawyer that would truly represent my case and steer the case in the right direction.  There were times he could of just said sorry and moved on but he didn't.  My lawyer truly represented me and utilized his knowledge and got me the best case scenario.  He could of made his day easier and go the easy route but he pushed on and made a fair trial for both parties and we both walked away happy.  I didn't want to screw anyone over and at the same time I didn't want to get screwed over.  Thank you William Doonan, you're a stand up guy and greatly appreciated.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for these kind words.  It was my pleasure to represent you.

reviews.text: Excuses, excuses!  Just like other reviews state..they don't reach out.  I tried 2x to get a response by filling out the online form, and nothing.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am so sorry to hear this. We make every effort to respond to every inquiry.  I have searched to see if I have received anything from anyone named Marcus and I found not even one inquiry.  Please call me so we can resolve this asap. Every call is important to my office.

reviews.text: Probably one of the best, if not the best lawyer in town. William has handled my case very professionally. I have known what has been going on at all times with my case, and the communication has been open across the board. Responds very quickly to all my questions whether via call or email. When we went to court one time I even heard one of the other attorneys that was representing the other party say to William, "Wow that is really good, I will have to take notes for next time." That is when I knew I picked a good attorney to represent me. We even went to court a different time during the middle of my divorce, because the other party was trying to say that I violated the orders that were put into place by the judge. Well lets just say that everything was dismissed. If you like winning then William B. Doonan is the man to represent you. If I could give more then 5 stars I would.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!  It is my pleasure representing you.

reviews.text: What a JOKE!! Their office building looks abandoned and no one ever answers the phone!! I've left two voicemails and no one has bothered to even return my calls!! I even submitted their online form twice and still haven't heard from anyone affiliated with this law firm!! Why bother to have a "running" website when it's obvious they've either shut down their practice or are completely ignoring potential clients!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Salcido:
I apologize that you did not get a response. Our office was closed due to Mr. Doonan's daughter getting married and graduating college. There is a sign on the door as well. We do strive to take excellent care of our clients. I wish you the very best in your search for legal representation. Thank you for your interest in our firm.
Thank you for your review!

Based on my firsthand experience with this office, professionalism and clear communication are standards they take very seriously. They work hard to ensure calls are handled properly and concerns are addressed in a timely manner.

The attorneys are respectful, dedicated, and committed to providing quality legal representation. Constructive feedback from clients is always welcome however, commentary that lacks accuracy or proper context does not reflect the standards or operations of this office.

This office remains a reputable, client-focused firm and takes pride in the quality of legal services they provide. Anyone seeking reliable and professional legal representation is very much encouraged to contact this office.

A lot of  people think lawyers are snakes and are only in the business for the money. I was one of those until I met Mr. Aaron  Eckman. I was facing some serious felony charges in what most say is the worst county to face charges because in this particular area they really don’t have their cases in order and definitely don’t take the time to notify you of your court dates. I first acquired Aaron not really to beat the charge but so I wouldn’t miss a court date. I tried calling and checking every month but as I stated it’s almost like this county wants you to miss court. He gathered all the info on the case and stayed well communicated throughout over three years and countless court dates. I was getting discouraged and just sick of the charges and court dates hanging over my head to the point I called Aaron and told him I wanted to take the plea they offered. It was felony probation on charges that were false but after all this time I was ready to just bite the bullet and deal with the probation. At this point Aaron was fully confiscated for his legal services and had no reason to fight against me to end the long drawn out case. He was having to drive over an hour to each court date so why would he say anything to deter my decision when it would only benefit him to just let me take the probation. The day after I notified him of my decision to just take the probation plea he called and told me that He couldn’t let me do it and to hold out and fight with him because felony probation isn’t an answer when the state has no case!!..I immediately told him that I would put my trust in him and whatever he advised is what I want. After many more court dates of them just putting it off over and over they finally dismissed the case. Only because of his selfless service and his esteemed character did he continue on after I was ready to fold . He is the very definition of the best lawyer in the world. I would stand by him in any situation because he stood by me in my worst. It’s hard to put in words how awesome he has been for me and I’m gonna end this cause I’m tearing up. Thank you Mr. Arron Eckman for being the best / /selfless servant/ strongest character/ professional and God bless you and your family forever!!
Great lawyers and very helpful. Thanks!!
